message.content:
@startuml
participant "LCM" as LCM
participant "Class\nApplicationProperty" as AP #lightgreen
participant "Class\nDscResourceBase" as DRB #lightblue
participant "Function\nConvertTo-HashtableFromObject" as CTH #lightblue
participant "Function\nTest-DscParameterState" as TDP #lightblue

LCM -> AP : ApplicationProperty.Test()
activate AP

AP -> DRB : ([DscResourceBase] $this).Test()
activate DRB

DRB -> CTH : $this
activate CTH
CTH --> DRB : Return Type: [Hashtable]
deactivate CTH

DRB -> DRB : $actual = $this.Get()
activate DRB
deactivate DRB

DRB -> CTH : $actual
activate CTH
CTH --> DRB : Return Type: [Hashtable]
deactivate CTH

DRB -> TDP : Parameter: both Hashtables
activate TDP
note right of TDP
  DscResourceBase must determine which properties
  are optional to exclude them the comparison.
end note
TDP --> DRB : Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate TDP

DRB --> AP : Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate DRB

AP --> LCM : Return Type: [Boolean]
deactivate AP

@enduml
